commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The blocker is a focused repair: add CLI-owned hook rewrite/cancel coverage and adjust transcript ownership so channel-visible finals mirror the delivered payload.; Needs attention: The diff can bypass outbound redaction/suppression hooks for durable transcript persistence of CLI-owned channel replies.; Review finding: [P1] Keep delivery hooks authoritative for CLI-owned finals — src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch... (sha=3e6b7a7936bf8089e25cb183b38e07d6f2c423cd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds same-channel Slack final-reply transcript mirroring, CLI assistant transcript persistence, session-binding refresh plumbing, and regression coverage for dispatcher hook rewrites/removals.

PR surface: Source +404, Tests +782. Total +1186 across 31 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. A CLI-owned payload is pre-persisted and marked `assistantTranscriptOwned`, then dispatch skips the post-hook Slack mirror even though the dispatcher still runs hook rewrites/cancellations before visible delivery.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocker is a focused repair: add CLI-owned hook rewrite/cancel coverage and adjust transcript ownership so channel-visible finals mirror the delivered payload.
